## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: "Closes #123". -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Which tests were added/changed? How did you verify it works? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `just lint && just test` pass locally (same as CI)
- [ ] New behavior has tests; bug fixes have a regression test
- [ ] Docs and `CHANGELOG.md` (`[Unreleased]`) updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:` …)
- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
